In [1]:
import ipyrad.analysis as ipa         # ipyrad analysis tools
import pandas as pd                   # DataFrames
import numpy as np                    # data generation
import toytree                        # tree plotting
import toyplot                        # data plotting
print(ipa.__version__)

0.9.51

all¶

In [57]:
SEQS = "/moto/eaton/projects/ped_3RAD/lowdepth-all6_outfiles/lowdepth-all6.seqs.hdf5"
In [59]:
IMAP = {
    "lachno": ["lachnoglossa-DE612"],
    "rhinanth": ["rhinanthoides-DE526"],
    "integ" : ["integrifolia-DE558"],
    "kansu": ["kansuensis-DE525"],
    "crano": ["cranolopha-DE189"],
    "longi": ["longiflora-DE175"]
}

MINMAP = {i: 0.75 for i in IMAP}
In [60]:
# a starting tree hypothesis in newick format
TREE = "(lachno, (rhinanth, ((integ, kansu), (crano, longi))));"

# draw the tree
toytree.tree(TREE).draw(ts='s');
In [76]:
# create a bpp object to run algorithm 00
all = ipa.bpp(
    name="all100",
    workdir="./analysis-bpp",
    data=SEQS,
    guidetree=TREE,
    imap=IMAP,
    minmap=MINMAP,  
    maxloci=100,
    reps_resample_loci=False,
    infer_sptree=0,
    infer_delimit=0,
    burnin=1e4,
    nsample=1e5,
    sampfreq=10,
)
In [81]:
all.kwargs["thetaprior"] = (3, 0.007)
all.kwargs["tauprior"] = (3, 10.5)
all.draw_priors(gentime_min=1, gentime_max=3, mutrate_min=5e-9, mutrate_max=1e-8);
In [ ]:
all.ipcluster['cores'] = 8
all.run(auto=True, nreps=4, force=True)
In [66]:
# reload results using name and workdir
all = ipa.bpp(name="all100", workdir="analysis-bpp/")

# call summarize
tables, mcmcs = all.summarize_results("00", individual_results=False)

tables.T

cranolopha¶

In [2]:
# a seqs.hdf5 database produced by ipyrad 
SEQS ="/moto/eaton/projects/ped_3RAD/lowdepth-crano_outfiles/lowdepth-crano.seqs.hdf5"
In [3]:
# group individuals into populations based on RAxML tree
IMAP = {
    "out": ["bidentata-DE625", "bidentata-DE635"],
    "red": ["cranolopha-DE355", "cranolopha-DE350", "cranolopha-DE368"],
    "orange": ["cranolopha-DE670", "cranolopha-DE206"],
    "yellow": ["cranolopha-DE231", "cranolopha-DE189", "cranolopha-DE98", "cranolopha-DE186"],
    "green": ["cranolopha-DE173", "cranolopha-DE177"],
    "blue": ["cranolopha-DE137", "cranolopha-DE167"],
    "purple": ["cranolopha-DE279", "cranolopha-DE252"],
    "black": ["cranolopha-DE370", "cranolopha-DE385", "cranolopha-DE387", "cranolopha-DE85"]
}

# require that 75% of samples have data in each group (map species names to minimum coverage thresholds)
MINMAP = {i: 0.75 for i in IMAP}
In [4]:
# a starting tree hypothesis in newick format
TREE = "(decorissima-DE202:0.00737273,decorissima-DE212:0.00609573,((armata-DE613:0.0102666,armata-DE727:0.00918689)100:0.00706426,((bidentata-DE625:0.00804805,bidentata-DE635:0.00529602)100:0.00931214,((cranolopha-DE355:0.0112347,(cranolopha-DE350:0.0096276,cranolopha-DE368:0.00890651)100:0.00446669)100:0.00564039,((cranolopha-DE670:0.0140263,cranolopha-DE206:0.0129816)92:0.00252411,((cranolopha-DE231:0.00901961,(cranolopha-DE189:0.0100733,(cranolopha-DE98:0.00343905,cranolopha-DE186:0.00380722)100:0.00768407)100:0.00193367)99:0.00286284,(((cranolopha-DE173:0.00936813,cranolopha-DE177:0.00646579)100:0.0025664,(cranolopha-DE137:0.00977329,cranolopha-DE167:0.00902633)100:0.00283994)93:0.0019909,((cranolopha-DE279:0.00903039,cranolopha-DE252:0.00918549)99:0.00209318,((cranolopha-DE370:0.0105664,cranolopha-DE385:0.00767578)100:0.00209356,(cranolopha-DE387:0.0114801,cranolopha-DE85:0.00845819)100:0.00245347)98:0.00117062)87:0.00141728)72:0.00149112)73:0.00129559)81:0.00106458)100:0.00470039)100:0.00234674)100:0.00722026);"

# draw the tree
toytree.tree(TREE).draw();
In [5]:
# a starting tree hypothesis in newick format
TREE = "(out, (red, (orange, (yellow, ((green, blue), (purple, black))))));"

# draw the tree
toytree.tree(TREE).draw(ts='s');
In [6]:
# create a bpp object to run algorithm 00
crano = ipa.bpp(
    name="crano500",
    workdir="./analysis-bpp",
    data=SEQS,
    guidetree=TREE,
    imap=IMAP,
    minmap=MINMAP,  
    maxloci=500,
    reps_resample_loci=False,
    infer_sptree=0,
    infer_delimit=0,
    burnin=1e4,
    nsample=1e5,
    sampfreq=10,
)
In [7]:
crano.kwargs["thetaprior"] = (3, 0.007)
crano.kwargs["tauprior"] = (3, 0.002)
crano.draw_priors(gentime_min=1, gentime_max=3, mutrate_min=5e-9, mutrate_max=1e-8);

In [19]:
# a starting tree hypothesis in newick format
TREE = "(out, (red, ((orange, yellow), (green, (blue, (purple, black))))));"

# draw the tree
toytree.tree(TREE).draw(ts='s');
In [20]:
# create a bpp object to run algorithm 00
kansu = ipa.bpp(
    name="kansu500",
    workdir="./analysis-bpp",
    data=SEQS,
    guidetree=TREE,
    imap=IMAP,
    minmap=MINMAP,  
    maxloci=500,
    reps_resample_loci=True,
    infer_sptree=0,
    infer_delimit=0,
    burnin=1e4,
    nsample=1e5,
    sampfreq=10,
)
In [21]:
kansu.kwargs["thetaprior"] = (3, 0.007)
kansu.kwargs["tauprior"] = (3, 0.0035)
kansu.draw_priors(gentime_min=1, gentime_max=3, mutrate_min=5e-9, mutrate_max=1e-8);

# call summarize
tables, mcmcs = kansu.summarize_results("00", individual_results=False)

IMAP = {
    "out": ["bidentata-DE625", "bidentata-DE635"],
    "red": ["rhinanthoides-DE245", "rhinanthoides-DE299", "rhinanthoides-DE290"],
    "orange": ["rhinanthoides-DE219", "rhinanthoides-DE581", "rhinanthoides-DE639", "rhinanthoides-DE617",
               "rhinanthoides-DE608", "rhinanthoides-DE703", "rhinanthoides-DE667", "rhinanthoides-DE682"],
    "yellow": ["rhinanthoides-DE393", "rhinanthoides-DE360", "rhinanthoides-DE348"],
    "green": ["rhinanthoides-DE71", "rhinanthoides-DE50", "rhinanthoides-DE22"],
    "blue": ["rhinanthoides-DE112", "rhinanthoides-DE522", "rhinanthoides-DE535", "rhinanthoides-DE526",
             "rhinanthoides-DE159", "rhinanthoides-DE560", "rhinanthoides-DE140", "rhinanthoides-DE125"]   
}

MINMAP = {i: 0.75 for i in IMAP}
In [39]:
# a starting tree hypothesis in newick format
TREE = '(armata-DE613:0.00952031,armata-DE727:0.00921728,((decorissima-DE212:0.00523608,decorissima-DE202:0.00829105)100:0.00792966,((bidentata-DE625:0.00935079,bidentata-DE635:0.00374657)100:0.00874864,(rhinanthoides-DE494:0.0163081,((rhinanthoides-DE245:0.0117144,(rhinanthoides-DE299:0.00675495,rhinanthoides-DE290:0.0087377)100:0.00404827)100:0.0015076,(((rhinanthoides-DE219:0.00917307,rhinanthoides-DE581:0.0109763)100:0.00261848,((rhinanthoides-DE639:0.0116296,(rhinanthoides-DE617:0.00810588,rhinanthoides-DE608:0.00835139)100:0.00196125)100:0.00206104,(rhinanthoides-DE703:0.00947662,(rhinanthoides-DE667:0.00917793,rhinanthoides-DE682:0.00988118)100:0.00170636)100:0.00174388)100:0.00131314)100:0.00176104,((rhinanthoides-DE393:0.011353,(rhinanthoides-DE360:0.00914117,rhinanthoides-DE348:0.00810537)100:0.00332426)100:0.00237662,((rhinanthoides-DE71:0.0104593,(rhinanthoides-DE50:0.01075,rhinanthoides-DE22:0.0141034)100:0.00279148)100:0.00225361,(rhinanthoides-DE112:0.0127391,((rhinanthoides-DE522:0.0101474,(rhinanthoides-DE535:0.00983893,rhinanthoides-DE526:0.0106205)100:0.00108749)100:0.00169485,(rhinanthoides-DE159:0.0101917,(rhinanthoides-DE560:0.00898414,(rhinanthoides-DE140:0.0073086,rhinanthoides-DE125:0.00853735)100:0.00201398)100:0.00126607)100:0.00172333)100:0.00116437)100:0.00157174)100:0.00135822)100:0.00186636)100:0.0012173)100:0.00225269)100:0.00234961)100:0.00123077)100:0.00633659);'

# draw the tree
toytree.tree(TREE).draw();
In [40]:
# a starting tree hypothesis in newick format
TREE = "(out, (red, (orange, (yellow, (green, blue)))));"

# draw the tree
toytree.tree(TREE).draw(ts='s');
In [41]:
# create a bpp object to run algorithm 00
rhinanth = ipa.bpp(
    name="rhinanth500",
    workdir="./analysis-bpp",
    data=SEQS,
    guidetree=TREE,
    imap=IMAP,
    minmap=MINMAP,  
    maxloci=500,
    reps_resample_loci=True,
    infer_sptree=0,
    infer_delimit=0,
    burnin=1e4,
    nsample=1e5,
    sampfreq=10,
)
In [42]:
rhinanth.kwargs["thetaprior"] = (3, 0.007)
rhinanth.kwargs["tauprior"] = (3, 0.006)
rhinanth.draw_priors(gentime_min=1, gentime_max=3, mutrate_min=5e-9, mutrate_max=1e-8);

# reload results using name and workdir
rhinanth = ipa.bpp(name="rhinanth500", workdir="analysis-bpp/")

# call summarize
tables, mcmcs = rhinanth.summarize_results("00", individual_results=False)

tables.T
